description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 20, 2025 at 10:12 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Mateo, California was in a collision 
involving a passenger car on Ralston Avenue at the entrance and exit ramps of State Route 92 J. Arthur Younger Freeway. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northwestbound in the left lane on Ralston Avenue when it came to a stop before entering the intersection at 
the entrance and exit ramps of State Route 92 to yield to inoperative traffic lights that were not exhibiting any signal. While the Waymo AV 
remained stopped, a passenger car traveling northwestbound on Ralston Avenue in the left lane approached the Waymo AV from behind, 
and the front of the passenger car made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS 
was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
